=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:14-5:26) TS377054: The error channel contains an Effect (Effect<void, never, never>). Putting Effect computations in the failure channel is not intended; keep only failure types there. effect(effectInFailure)

  Fix 1: "Disable effectInFailure for entire file"
